sourceOfTruth.componentImports: Use the family modules under admin/src/shared/ui/AdminPrimitives/ for reusable admin UI shells and admin/src/shared/feedback for app-level providers; admin/src/features/** may export only route/workspace entry components.

components.notes: Shared admin feedback provider. Preview coverage is not required because it wraps the app context rather than rendering a standalone surface.

Route wrapper owns TanStack Query list/detail fetches and review mutations; preview renders the registered AccessReviewWorkspace with deterministic application/detail/decision fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Access Review workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; list/detail query and mutation logic stay in AccessReviewScreen.

Route wrapper owns TanStack Query assignment register fetches and role mutation behavior; preview renders the registered AdminRoleManagementWorkspace with deterministic assignment/role fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Admin Roles workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; query, register fetch, and mutation logic stay in AdminRoleManagementScreen.
Route wrapper owns TanStack Query controller; preview renders the shared DataQualityScreen preview workspace with deterministic source/state/detail fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Data Quality workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; controller-owned query logic stays in DataQualityScreen.

Route wrapper owns TanStack Query canonical event, external event, and readiness fetches plus safe event/external publish mutations; preview renders the registered EventPublishingWorkspace with deterministic canonical directory and external supply fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Event Publishing workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; query/mutation logic stays in EventPublishingScreen.
Route wrapper owns TanStack Query controller; preview renders the registered FinanceOpsWorkspace with deterministic issue/reconciliation fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Finance Ops workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; controller-owned query logic stays in FinanceOpsScreen.
Route wrapper owns TanStack Query controller; preview renders the registered GrowthKpiWorkspace with deterministic signal/trend fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Growth KPI workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; controller-owned query logic stays in GrowthKpiScreen.
Tabbed route shell owns event, organizer, and read-only automation composition; previews use deterministic controller fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Intake workspace shell used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; live event, organizer, and automation composition stays in IntakeWorkspaceScreen.
Live Event Intake hook wrapper registered for export governance; deterministic preview coverage belongs to workspace_event_intake via EventIntakePreviewWorkspace.
Live Supply Intake operations hook wrapper; deterministic preview coverage belongs to workspace_intake_operations.
Prop-driven read-only Supply Intake operations inventory backed by canonical run and work-item fixtures.

Organizer Intake live route wrapper delegates to OrganizerIntakeWorkspace with feedback providers; deterministic preview coverage uses generated organizer intake bridge fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Organizer Intake workspace used by the live route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; generated bridge state and mutation callbacks are supplied by the controller seam.

Marketing Ops route wrapper keeps live admin feedback props and delegates to MarketingOpsWorkspace; deterministic preview coverage uses generated marketing dashboard bridge fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven Marketing Ops workspace used by the live route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; generated dashboard state and no-op callbacks are supplied through the controller seam.

Organizer Publishing route wrapper delegates to OrganizerPublishingWorkspace with admin feedback providers; deterministic preview coverage uses shared sample organizer details in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.

Prop-driven Organizer Publishing workspace used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; canonical directory rows, route readiness, and publishing contract state come from shared sample organizer fixtures.

Admin Overview is a read-only router: complete headline metrics and live queue rows appear before analytics, queue rows open their role-checked owning workflow, and range/entity controls apply only to the analysis below. The preview is backed by sample overview and host analytics fixtures in admin/src/stories/AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Lazy live route wrapper owns the Overview controller/query seam; deterministic prop-driven visual coverage remains on route_overview.

URL-owned Safety list route backed by an explicit SafetyTriageController fixture. Metric cards and queue-composition bars use aggregate open counts; priority and age disclose their capped returned-preview scope. Opening a row navigates to a separate encoded target-path route instead of stacking detail below the table.

Prop-driven Safety case workspace renders one record at a time with back navigation, evidence, assignment, and existing audited reviewed/dismissed mutations; successful decisions return to the list route.

Route wrapper owns QueryClient, handoff, and sample-mode autoload behavior; preview renders the registered UserAnalyticsWorkspace with deterministic aggregate report fixtures in AdminRoutes.stories.tsx.
Prop-driven User Analytics workspace surface used by the route wrapper and deterministic Storybook previews; query, handoff, and sample-mode autoload logic stay in UserAnalyticsScreen.
